matches.text:
# Refund Policy

## How do I request a refund?
Send your order number and a short explanation to support. Refund requests are reviewed after we verify the return status and the payment method used.

## How long do refunds take?
Approved refunds usually appear in 5 to 10 business days, depending on the bank or payment provider.

## Can shipping fees be refunded?
Shipping fees are refundable only when the refund is caused by our error, such as a wrong item or a damaged shipment.

## What if my refund is rejected?
If a refund is rejected, we will explain the reason and share the next possible step, such as a replacement or a return review.

# Order FAQ

## How do I place an order?
Choose the product, add it to your cart, and complete checkout with your shipping details and payment method. You will receive an order confirmation by email after payment succeeds.

## Can I change my order after payment?
If the order has not entered fulfillment, contact support as soon as possible. We can usually update the shipping address or correct a typo before the package is packed.

## How do I check my order status?
Use the order tracking link in your confirmation email or log in to your account and open the Orders page.

## Can I cancel an order?
Orders can be canceled only before they are packed or handed to the courier. Once shipping starts, the order must follow the return process.

# Shipping FAQ

## How long does shipping take?
Standard shipping usually takes 3 to 5 business days after the order leaves the warehouse. Remote areas can take longer depending on the courier.

## How do I track my package?
You can track your package using the tracking number sent by email. The tracking link is also available in your account order history.

## What if the tracking number does not work?
Tracking numbers may take up to 24 hours to become active after the label is created. If it still does not work after that, contact support with your order number.

## Do you ship on weekends?
Warehouse processing happens on business days only, so orders placed on weekends are usually processed on the next working day.

matches.text:
# Shipping FAQ

## How long does shipping take?
Standard shipping usually takes 3 to 5 business days after the order leaves the warehouse. Remote areas can take longer depending on the courier.

## How do I track my package?
You can track your package using the tracking number sent by email. The tracking link is also available in your account order history.

## What if the tracking number does not work?
Tracking numbers may take up to 24 hours to become active after the label is created. If it still does not work after that, contact support with your order number.

## Do you ship on weekends?
Warehouse processing happens on business days only, so orders placed on weekends are usually processed on the next working day.

# Account Login

## How do I reset my password?
Click Forgot Password on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the reset link we send. The link expires after a limited time for security.

## Why can't I log in?
Common reasons include a wrong password, an unverified email address, or a temporary account lock after several failed attempts.

## Can I change my email address?
Yes. Open account settings and update your email, then confirm the change through the verification message we send to the new address.

## What if I do not receive the reset email?
Check your spam folder and confirm that the email address matches your account. If it still does not arrive, ask support to resend the link.
